title: GLM-5.2 (Fully Tested): I got EARLY ACCESS & This MODEL is CRAZY!
summary: GLM-5.2 is a new language model from Z AI featuring a 1 million token context window, expected to be open-weight and MIT licensed, and accessible through the GLM Coding Plan subscription at approximately $8 per month. The model scores 81.43 on coding benchmarks, approximately 6 percent below Opus 4.8 and Fable, with strong performance on code generation and local fine-tuning tasks.
writeup: This video reviews GLM-5.2, a new language model from Z AI, based on early access testing. The model carries a 1 million token context window, is expected to ship open-weight under an MIT license, and is reachable through the GLM Coding Plan subscription at roughly $8 per month. On coding benchmarks it scores 81.43, about 6 percent below Opus 4.8 and Fable, with the testing emphasizing code generation and local fine-tuning tasks.
